title: ExcellentKillstreaks
description: ExcellentKillStreaks or ExStreaks is a lightweight but featureful killstreaks plugin for your Paper server.
body:
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_on-Modrinth-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fplugin%2Fexcellentkillstreaks)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/excellentkillstreaks) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_on-Hangar-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=hangar&logoColor=blue&color=blue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fplugin%2Fexcellentkillstreaks)](https://hangar.papermc.io/DragonDevelopsStuff/ExcellentKillstreaks) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_on-Github-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&color=lightgray)](https://github.com/Nerd10000/ExcellentKillstreaks) ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d503092965d4578115de6767e764129d708842d.png) ExcellentKillStreaks (ExStreaks) is a lightweight but featureful paper plugin for you Minecraft server. It offers a variety of useful features for a killstreaks plugin.The plugin was made for KitPVP or FFA servers.

- 📦 **Persistent data** — The data is saved on the disk so you don't need to worry about stopping the server or the host crashing and players lose their killstreaks. - 🪶 **Light as a feather** — The plugin does not store a lot of stuff in memory and mainly everything is saved on the disk. - 📂 **Open source** — The plugin's sorce code is available on Github so you can suggest improvements, report issues/bugs. **❗WARNING! THE PLUGIN IS LICENSED UNDER GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE V3!** - 🆘 **Fast support** — I am available frequently so send me a friend request and message me if you have any questions! dragonmc. - 🔤 PlaceholderAPI (optional) support! — The plugin can hook into PlaceholderAPI and register its own expansion which allows you to use the plugin's placeholders in scoreboards! - 🛑 **Anti-killfarm feature** (from v1.3.0) — The plugin can detect when players killfarm each other and stop them via not giving them +1 killstreak. ### 🔨 Optional Dependencies - PlaceholderAPI ### 👨‍💻 Required Dependencies - Paper API (any fork of paper) ### 👀 Commands and Permissions | Command | Permission | | ------- | ---------- | | /exstreaks | exstreaks.admin | | /streak | No perms | | /beststreak | No perms | ### Here are some videos! (Sorry for the quality I am not a youtuber.) **If you find any bugs please report it in a DM message or preferably in Github Issues!** [![dc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79ce9f4f1625013d66909bc07416bbbbd42b5162.png)](https://discord.gg/kSVuZzgE) Made by DragonDevelopsStuff / DragonCraft64.
